value.found_quote: Automatically deploy, scale, and manage containers with Google Kubernetes Engine or Cloud Run
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Cloud Run as a "Fully managed environment for running containerized apps," and mentions it alongside Google Kubernetes Engine for deploying and scaling containers. The page also describes Agent Platform as a "fully-managed AI development platform to build and manage AI applications and agents." These offerings collectively substantiate the claim that Google provides a cloud execution environment for running agents in a managed cloud/container environment.
